headline: Is Deckers Outdoor Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: Deckers Outdoor has lagged behind the Dow Jones over the past year, yet analysts remain somewhat bullish about the stock’s outlook.

raw.headline: Is Deckers Outdoor Stock Underperforming the Dow?
raw.summary: Deckers Outdoor has lagged behind the Dow Jones over the past year, yet analysts remain somewhat bullish about the stock’s outlook.

headline: Nike Was Betting Big On The FIFA World Cup - But This Analyst Just Killed The Turnaround Hype And Slashed Price Targets
summary: Nike faces an RBC downgrade as analysts warn its turnaround is lagging and market share risks are mounting.
